metadata.description: Production-grade standards for Claude Code — Flutter, API (NestJS + Prisma), Web (Next.js). Install a pack, Claude applies the standards. No CLAUDE.md edits.

plugins.name: flutter-standards
plugins.description: Flutter pack — 10 auto-invoke standards (craft, engineering, widgets, data, testing, a11y, perf, forms, observability, production-readiness with smart Detect→Check→Suggest audits for retry/lifecycle/deep-links/push/force-update/secure-storage/locale/offline/env-logging), 8 audit/scaffold skills invoked via slash commands, 3 review agents.

plugins.name: api-standards
plugins.description: API pack — NestJS + Prisma. 2 auto-invoke standards (nestjs, code-quality with smart Detect→Check→Suggest audits for rate limiting, idempotency, retries, webhooks, graceful shutdown, health, correlation IDs, soft delete, audit logs, DB pool), sync-migrate workflow, api-documenter + security-reviewer agents.

plugins.name: web-standards
plugins.description: Web pack — Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. 3 auto-invoke standards (nextjs, production-readiness, craft-guide — universal design formulas across color+contrast+harmony, spacing, type, shadow, radius, motion, state, responsive, aesthetic coherence, iconography, chrome, a11y, theme, microcopy, brand moments). 5 explicit skills: pre-ship, premium-check (17-section iteration-loop craft audit), extract-tokens, theme-audit, aesthetic-coherence. Universal formulas enforced; brand values come from user.

plugins.name: core-hooks
plugins.description: Cross-stack safety + docs-sync + subagent-brief + verify-changes — PreToolUse hooks (block secret edits + dangerous shell), docs-sync skill (end-of-task drift catcher), subagent-brief skill (warm-brief discipline on delegation), verify-changes skill (generic cross-stack verification with dependency graph + batched execution for large changesets). Pure prompt, no external dependencies.
